title: Dagnix decoration
description: This modpack adds new dimension, decorative Blocks and new combinations
body:
### This modpack adds new dimension, decorative Blocks and new combinations, including for now: 
**_Dimension Update(by Davi_Dag), Danix's decoration(by Danix 358), jei for more orientation, jei puglins, and optimizations mods like entity culling or immediately fast to provide a optimized experience in the mod pack.
You can beat up bosses, decorate your base with more thinghs, like marble and other blocks, with new dimensions like "The best", "Haven" and "Cosmos", with also a brand new end update, adding trees, Anicient Builders, new ores like quarts._**
### **_Enjoy!_**
![More Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42379861e3179a5689b9915a9113e138d9d12f1d.png)
![Cosmo Dimension](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89670b0f89c83ae38715ae70c2fb9f4841f6fa43.png)
